title: Rich Mediterranean Lentil Casserole
description: Jammy, crispy tomato-lentil casserole finished in a bain-marie for tender texture.
instructions: Heat a Dutch oven over medium heat and drizzle olive oil, then sauté onion, garlic, and carrot until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in cumin, smoked paprika, oregano, and salt, cooking for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add lentils and tomato juice, stirring to combine and let the mixture come to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until lentils are tender but not mushy.
While the lentils cook, place a baking dish inside a larger pot, add 2 inches of hot water, and bring to a simmer for a bain-marie.
When the lentils are nearly done, transfer the mixture into the preheated baking dish, top with breadcrumbs, and place the dish in the bain-marie.
Cover the outer pot and bake at 350F for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden and crispy.
Remove the casserole from the bain-marie, let rest 5 minutes, then serve hot.
